content.full_text:
California 
Fair Political 
Practices Commission 
Diane C. Yu 
General Counsel 
The state Bar of California 
555 Franklin street 
August 31, 1988 
San Francisco, CA 
94102-4498 
Dear Ms. Yu: 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. 1-87-325 
I am writing to confirm the substance of our telephone 
conversation' of August 15, 1988. 
At that time, you advised me you would be sending us a 
letter withdrawing your advice request. 
I have not received a 
·copy of the letter so I am writing to confirm that you have 
withdrawn your request. 
Please let me know immediately if you disagree with the 
contents of this letter. 
DMG:MA:aa 
Sincerely, 
Diane M. Griffiths 
Ge)leral counsel

sections.question_synthetic: Whether an advice request from the State Bar of California (File No. 1-87-325) should be withdrawn.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC confirms the withdrawal of the advice request, as discussed in a telephone conversation on August 15, 1988, and requests confirmation of disagreement if any exists.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a withdrawal confirmation letter. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections present. Document dated August 31, 1988 (one year after the file number year 1987). The request itself is not included; this letter merely confirms the withdrawal discussed by phone.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether an advice request from the State Bar of California () should be withdrawn.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC confirms the withdrawal of the advice request, as discussed in a telephone conversation on August 15, 1988, and requests confirmation of disagreement if any exists.
